creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
on http://www.libpng.org/pub/png/libpng.html you list file sizes for 
 libpng.tar.bz2 at 641193 and md5 checksum at
 
 310954baea8bedbe1a1c0fbd13a494ad
 
 
 however, several mirrors (including ftp.simplesystems.org and at least 
 one sourceforge.net site) have
 MD5 (/var/ports/distfiles/libpng-1.2.27.tar.bz2) = 
 d2f0339117eb190ce3db98c139198c88
 with file size 804821
 
 I noticed an April 30th 10am date/time stamp on the file on 
 ftp.simplesystems.org  which is right?
 
 
 -- 
 Michael Scheidell, CTO
